# The Social Seen

> A curated social events platform for London professionals. We connect people through handpicked experiences — supper clubs, gallery openings, wine tastings, cultural soirées, and more.

## About

The Social Seen is London's premier social community for professionals in their 30s–40s who believe the best moments are experienced together. We curate intimate events designed to spark genuine connections.

## Pages

- [Home](https://thesocialseen.com): Landing page with featured events and community overview
- [Events](https://thesocialseen.com/events): Full listing of upcoming and past events with category and price filters
- [Gallery](https://thesocialseen.com/gallery): Photo gallery from past events
- [Join](https://thesocialseen.com/join): Membership registration

## Event Categories

drinks, dining, cultural, wellness, sport, workshops, music, networking

## Contact

For enquiries, visit [thesocialseen.com](https://thesocialseen.com).
